response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches JSON reference for both songs perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics for transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visual text during the transition (04:28-04:36) when the song title card is shown, and kept exact audio pacing elsewhere.

subtitles.original: 繋がっていたいって 信じられる言葉
subtitles.english: Words that make me believe I want to be connected

subtitles.original: だってもう昨日の僕らにおさらば
subtitles.english: Because we have already bid farewell to the us of yesterday

subtitles.original: 青い春を過ごした 遠い稲妻
subtitles.english: Faraway lightning bolt that passed through the blue spring

subtitles.original: さっと泣いて 前だけを向けたら
subtitles.english: If I could just cry and look straight ahead

subtitles.original: きっとどんなに楽になれていたろうな
subtitles.english: I wonder how much easier things would have become

subtitles.original: この心を揺らした 一縷の望みは
subtitles.english: A single glimmer of hope that shook my heart

subtitles.original: ないものねだりは辞めた 未完成人間
subtitles.english: I stopped asking for things I didn't have, I'm an incomplete human

subtitles.original: 素晴らしき世界だけが
subtitles.english: Only a wonderful world...

subtitles.original: 答えを握ってる
subtitles.english: ...holds the answer

subtitles.original: 諦めてしまうほど この先沢山の
subtitles.english: Enough to make me want to give up, so many...

subtitles.original: 後悔が君を待ってるけど
subtitles.english: ...regrets await you in the future, but...

subtitles.original: もうない 迷いはしないよ
subtitles.english: ...no more, I won't hesitate anymore

subtitles.original: この傷も愛しく 思えてしまうほど
subtitles.english: Enough to make even these wounds seem dear

subtitles.original: 重ねてしまうよ 不格好なまんまでいいから
subtitles.english: I'll pile them up, it's fine to stay just as I am, imperfect

subtitles.original: 走れ その歩幅で
subtitles.english: Run, with that stride,

subtitles.original: 走れ 声轟かせてくれ
subtitles.english: Run, let your voice roar!

subtitles.original: 期待と不安を同じくらい抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embracing expectations and anxieties in equal measure

subtitles.original: 君と今を紡ぐ未来照らして
subtitles.english: Illuminating the future I weave with you in the present

subtitles.original: 顔も名前も知らない僕たちが
subtitles.english: We, who don't know each other's faces or names

subtitles.original: たった1つの音をかき鳴らす
subtitles.english: Are striking a single sound together

subtitles.original: いたずらみたいな奇跡のような刹那
subtitles.english: In this moment that feels like a miracle, like a prank

subtitles.original: あっという間に流れる時が
subtitles.english: Time flows by in the blink of an eye

subtitles.original: ありのままで在り続ける怖さが
subtitles.english: The fear of continuing to exist just as I am
